publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2025-04-01 23:59:09 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: English, Latin script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: DC hardcore punk flyers

container.altrender: Slim legal flat box, (10w x 15.5d x 1.5h)
container.label: Mixed Materials [31924131119517]

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: Approximately 342 show flyers for Hardcore punk music events in Washington DC, 1981 - 1991. Bands featured include Minor Threat, Suicidal Tendencies, Fugazi, Scream, Iron Cross, Government Issue, Trouble Funk, Big Boys, Black Market Baby, The Faith, No Labels, Void, Black Flag, Circle Jerks, Marginal Man, Velvet Monkeys, Braille Party, and many more. Venues include DC Space, 9:30 Club, Space II Arcade, All Souls Church, Wilson Center, along with local schools and rec centers.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: DC hardcore punk flyers, #8170. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
